visa_types.name: Au Pair
visa_types.overview:
Please click below link for more information
Information for au pair applicants - UDI (https://www.udi.no/en/want-to-apply/au-pair/?c=usa)
VFS service fee of EURO 75 is required to be paid at the Application Center by each applicant Payments towards additional services will also be collected at the Application centre.
The applicant may request to have the passport returned from the embassy while the application is being processed. If the applicant later resubmits the passport for issuance of visa, VFS may request the applicant to pay EUR 67.50 to cover the Resubmission Courier.
